PROFILE.name: Nijanthan Elangovan
PROFILE.summary: Technical Writer with 5+ years of experience creating documentation, SOPs, and user-facing content for global products. Currently writing Help Center articles, operational docs, and AI chatbot content for Google Ads, YouTube, and SA360. Also brings a background in web development and UI design.

NOW.title: Senior Technical Writer
bullets: Help Center articles for Google Ads, SA360 & YouTube
AI chatbot content and conversational flows

contact.title: I’d love to hear what you’re working on.

EXPERIENCE.title: Senior Tech Writer Associate
bullets: Write external Help Center articles for Google Ads, SA360 & YouTube, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and localization readiness.
Develop internal SOPs and operational docs for troubleshooting, escalation handling, and trust & safety workflows.
Optimize AI chatbot content to improve task success and reduce support ticket volume.
Collaborate with PMs and UX Writers on launch communications for YouTube, DV360, Google Ads, and Policy & Billing.

EXPERIENCE.title: Content Writer & UI Designer
bullets: Wrote employee handbooks, project documentation, and marketing copy used across teams.
Authored and migrated web content (blogs, case studies) to meet accessibility and industry standards.
Managed multiple websites and used analytics to track content performance.
Handled UI design for web platforms and social media creatives alongside writing work.

EXPERIENCE.title: Web Developer & Content Producer
bullets: Produced and maintained content for 40+ websites (e-commerce, landing pages), each averaging 500k+ monthly views.
Ensured all content met compliance, accessibility, and SEO standards across the portfolio.
Applied web development skills alongside content strategy to improve search rankings and engagement.

EXPERIENCE.title: Content & Marketing Intern
bullets: Wrote copy for social media campaigns and marketing materials across multiple platforms.
Created branding assets and promotional content, combining writing and visual design for consistent messaging.

EXPERIENCE.title: Technical Content Writer
bullets: Developed technical content strategy and produced structured e-learning materials from scratch.
Managed the content pipeline end-to-end, collaborating with SMEs to ensure accuracy and relevance.

PROJECTS.title: Content at Scale: 40+ Websites
PROJECTS.blurb: Produced, structured, and maintained content across 40+ e-commerce and landing page sites, from product descriptions to compliance copy. Several properties crossed 500k+ monthly page views.

PROJECTS.title: E-learning Content: Website Learners
PROJECTS.blurb: Developed structured technical learning materials from scratch, covering strategy through production. Worked closely with SMEs to keep content accurate and engaging for a non-technical audience.

PROJECTS.title: OTT App: Content Architecture
PROJECTS.blurb: University project where I defined the content structure and information hierarchy for an OTT streaming app, focusing on how users discover and navigate content on TV interfaces.
